column1: もしも宝くじに当たったなら、世界中を旅したいと思う。
column2: もしもたからくじにあたったなら、せかいちゅうをたびしたいとおもう。
column3: If I were to win the lottery, I would want to travel around the world.
column4: もしも～なら / もしも～でも (emphatic if / even if)
column5: もしも + [Clause] + なら(ば) (emphatic if) / もしも + [Clause] + でも (emphatic even if)
column6: もしも+なら = emphatic hypothetical 'if'; もしも+でも = emphatic concessive 'even if'; both stronger than もし alone
column8: もしも = more emphatic than もし; なら = hypothetical if; でも = concessive even if; たとえ～ても = even if (concessive, strong)
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:もしも～なら・もしも～でも source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:top10k complexity:standard
